name: player_routes range year_offset scopes the route-count CTE to the offset window
description: The per-player-route CTE previously counted routes across EVERY season (its attach dropped query_context, so the view-scope year predicate never fired) -- year-agnostic, and a year_offset range was silently ignored. With query_context threaded through (mirroring the snaps attach), the CTE filters nfl_plays_receiver.year to the offset-expanded window (year=[2024] + offset [1,2] -> 2025,2026).
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t428928ff45dbd242cd82f51dfd9ceee8" as materialized (select "nfl_plays_receiver"."gsis_id", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays_receiver" inner join "nfl_plays" on "nfl_plays_receiver"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" and "nfl_plays_receiver"."playId" = "nfl_plays"."playId" where "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays_receiver"."year" in (2025, 2026) group by "nfl_plays_receiver"."gsis_id") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, t428928ff45dbd242cd82f51dfd9ceee8.rate_type_total_count as player_routes_0, "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t428928ff45dbd242cd82f51dfd9ceee8" on "t428928ff45dbd242cd82f51dfd9ceee8"."gsis_id" = "player"."gsisid" group by player.fname, player.lname, t428928ff45dbd242cd82f51dfd9ceee8.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
